title: pecteilis susannae subsp. henryi
intro: Pecteilis susannae subsp. henryi, also known as the Chinese orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pecteilis susannae subsp. henryi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
